name: N-3 node detectors: every N-3 detector honors --dry-run per the §2.14 dry-run contract
command: for d in boundary-schema console-in-src fetch-timeout naked-throw supply-chain; do grep -q -- '--dry-run' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/$d.sh" || { echo missing 1>&2; exit 1; }; done && echo all_dry_run 1>&2
